mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.project_name AS projectName, p.project_desc AS projectDesc, p.project_url AS projectUrl, p.author_name AS authorName, p.project_cover AS projectCover, p.star_count AS starCount, p.fork_count AS forkCount, DATE_FORMAT(p.last_commit_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS lastCommit FROM osh_open_project p WHERE p.status = 1 AND p.delete_flag = 0 AND p.is_archived = 0 ORDER BY (0.60 * IFNULL(LN(1 + IFNULL(p.star_count, 0)) / NULLIF((SELECT MAX(LN(1 + IFNULL(x.star_count, 0))) FROM osh_open_project x WHERE x.status = 1 AND x.delete_flag = 0 AND x.is_archived = 0), 0), 0) + 0.25 * IFNULL(LN(1 + IFNULL(p.fork_count, 0)) / NULLIF((SELECT MAX(LN(1 + IFNULL(x.fork_count, 0))) FROM osh_open_project x WHERE x.status = 1 AND x.delete_flag = 0 AND x.is_archived = 0), 0), 0) + 0.15 * IFNULL(LN(1 + IFNULL(p.click_count, 0)) / NULLIF((SELECT MAX(LN(1 + IFNULL(x.click_count, 0))) FROM osh_open_project x WHERE x.status = 1 AND x.delete_flag = 0 AND x.is_archived = 0), 0), 0)) * CASE WHEN p.last_commit_time IS NULL THEN 0.60 WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, p.last_commit_time, NOW()) <= 30 THEN 1.20 WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, p.last_commit_time, NOW()) <= 90 THEN 1.00 WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, p.last_commit_time, NOW()) <= 180 THEN 0.80 ELSE 0.60 END DESC, p.star_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
